overall.description: A third-person game engine scene showing a female character walking across vast white sand dunes or salt flats under a clear blue sky. The character walks steadily toward distant white hills for most of the clip, then turns right to walk along the dune base, exploring the minimalist desert landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert salt flat approaching white sand dunes

agents.ego_description: female character walking steadily across the flat white terrain toward the distant sand dunes

entered.detail: large smooth white sand dunes forming a continuous ridge on the horizon
vast flat white ground surface extending to the horizon
clear gradient blue sky with no clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily across an expansive white salt flat or desert plain under a clear blue sky. In the distance, large smooth white sand dunes form a continuous ridge that serves as the destination. The environment is completely empty and serene, with harsh midday lighting casting a long shadow behind the character.

events.description: character begins turning to the right, changing direction from approaching the dunes to walking parallel to them

agents.ego_description: character executes a right turn and continues walking along the base of the white sand dunes

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and begins walking along the base of the white sand dunes. The dunes, previously directly ahead, now occupy the left side of the frame as the camera follows the character's new trajectory. The terrain remains consistently flat and white, with the massive dune wall rising on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a minimalist white desert that shifts from a direct approach toward distant ridges to a lateral journey along their base. It begins with the character walking steadily across an expansive salt flat under a clear blue sky, heading toward a continuous ridge of smooth white sand dunes. As the character reaches the vicinity of these formations, the trajectory shifts right, causing the massive dune wall to transition from a distant destination to a towering presence on the left side of the frame. The scene then expands along the flat white terrain, following the character's new path while harsh midday lighting continues to cast a long shadow across the serene landscape.
